ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the game */,
  "daynum" INTEGER /* Day number in the season */,
  "wteam" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "lteam" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "wscore" INTEGER /* Score of the winning team */,
  "lscore" INTEGER /* Score of the losing team */,
  "wloc" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., Home, Away) */,
  "numot" INTEGER /* Number of overtimes played in the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the game is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Final) */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_lteam FOREIGN KEY ("lteam") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_wteam FOREIGN KEY ("wteam") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES officiating ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team represents */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference to which the team belongs */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Team ID the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches or centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds or kilograms */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Year the player joined the league */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "position_detail" TEXT /* Detailed position (e.g., Point Guard, Shooting Guard) */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is currently injured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "wfgm" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "wfga" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player */,
  "wfgm3" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made by the player */,
  "wfga3" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals attempted by the player */,
  "wftm" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "wfta" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player */,
  "wor" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds by the player */,
  "wdr" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds by the player */,
  "wast" INTEGER /* Assists by the player */,
  "wto" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player */,
  "wstl" INTEGER /* Steals by the player */,
  "wblk" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player */,
  "wpf" INTEGER /* Personal fouls by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw shooting percentage */,
  "rebounds_total" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player */,
  "assist_turnover_ratio" REAL /* Assist-to-turnover ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "coach_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Coach's win percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the league */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league season */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officiating" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officiating record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game officiated */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "referee_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the referee */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Name of the fan */,
  "favorite_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan's favorite team */,
  "fan_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the fan */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fan */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the fan */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Level of fan membership (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game for which the ticket is sold */,
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan who bought the ticket */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "seat" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the fan */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was purchased */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "ticket_status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., Purchased, Used, Refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_fan_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_id") REFERENCES fans ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
